rows.label: qev090603_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is where that xeno said
we could find the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hmm... But I don't see anything.
No Growth, no captives...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0004
rows.name:
Noble fools like you make for
the easiest sort of prey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0005
rows.name:
I am Stalio. I suppose you can think
of me as a colleague of sorts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0006
rows.name:
Except where you hunt creatures,
I hunt primitives like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_SEL0011
rows.name: Laugh at Stalio and her empty words.

rows.label: qev090603_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that only a coward relies
on such cheap tricks.

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0007
rows.name:
You humans are such a dim race. No
understanding of your place at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0008
rows.name:
You exist only to be used,
killed, and cast aside. You are
but puppets for my pleasure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0009
rows.name:
A typical primitive response. Will
you threaten to kill me next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0010
rows.name:
It makes no difference. Pray if you
will, for your empty lives end here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0013
rows.name:
Your hubris rings hollow. It's fear
that drives the weak to deception![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'll see that fear realized a hundredfold.
No xeno will see mercy from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090603_MSG0015
rows.name:
One last pathetic wail before
death. Now...let the hunt begin![ST:wait ]
